title: Skeptic Result
description: Result schema for the skeptic role. The skeptic performs blind review without seeing the implementer's narrative, looking for hidden coupling, rollback risk, and anchoring bias.

path.description: Relative file path where the issue was found.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence from the code or diff.

findings.description: List of findings. Each must include severity and issue description.

examples.summary: Token refresh endpoint is untested and the error path returns a bare 500 with no user-facing message.

findings.issue: Token refresh endpoint has no test coverage. If the refresh token is expired, the user hits a bare 500.
findings.evidence: No test file references refresh_token. The except block at line 42 raises HTTPException(500) with no detail.
